description_long: This is a modern white Mercedes-Benz minivan with a streamlined, boxy body and large, tinted windows on both sides. The front features a prominent Mercedes-Benz emblem on a black grille, flanked by sleek headlights. The side profile reveals two sliding doors, flush door handles, and alloy wheels with a five-spoke design. The rear is simple, with a single rear window and minimal badging, while the roof is smooth and uninterrupted, lacking any racks or rails. The windows are darkly tinted, providing privacy for the interior, which is likely composed of fabric and plastic materials. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and designed for urban or suburban family or group transport.
description: A white Mercedes-Benz minivan with large tinted windows, alloy wheels, and a sleek, modern design. The vehicle features sliding side doors and a prominent front grille with the Mercedes emblem.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, including two large tinted windows, sliding door, and alloy wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the Mercedes-Benz grille, emblem, headlights, and windshield.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, similar to the left, with sliding door and tinted windows visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the rear window, taillights, and minimal badging.
attribute_window_configuration: Large front windshield, two large side windows per side, single rear window; all windows are rectangular with rounded corners.
